description: VMware provides virtualization and cloud infrastructure software such as vSphere and VMware Cloud Director. These products expose management APIs on customer- or tenant-hosted endpoints for automating infrastructure operations.
summary: vmware.com surfaces documented on Broadcom’s developer portal include multiple tenant-hosted HTTP APIs: vSphere Automation API, Virtual Infrastructure JSON API, VMware Cloud Director OpenAPI, and the VMware Cloud Director Appliance API; only the Appliance API auth was clearly documented from the pages retrieved.
